name: shy-meta-skills
description: Codex plugin that bundles Shy meta-thinking skills for knowledge topology, theory grounding, and unknown-unknown discovery.

interface.longDescription: Shy Meta Skills bundles three Codex skills: knowledge topology for mapping a concept into its broader field, theory grounding for tracing practical problems back to historical theory, and unknown-unknown discovery for reframing stuck problems.
defaultPrompt: Find the theory ground behind this problem.
